REAndroid/APKEditor.Changelog:
## What's Changed
* Minor improvement on dex building performance
* Fix dex container building issues
* Fix smali parsing #198 
* Update README @yonggamer in https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/pull/203


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/compare/V1.4.4...V1.4.5

inotia00/revanced-cli.Changelog:
- Based on ReVanced Cli [5.0.0](https://github.com/ReVanced/revanced-cli/tree/v5.0.0)
- Added option command `options` (`options.json` file generator)
- Added option command `patches` (`patches.json` file generator)
- Added option command `--legacy-options` (set patch option via options.json file)
- Added option command `--rip-libs` (remove native libs from apk)
- Added option command `--unsigned` (disable signing of the final apk, regardless of whether it is mounted or not)
- Added support anti-split (merged some [REAndroid/ARSCLib](https://github.com/REAndroid/ARSCLib) sources to implement anti-split)

inotia00/revanced-patches.Changelog:
YouTube
==
- chore(YouTube - Spoof streaming data): Add client ids for TV and TV_UNPLUGGED
- chore(YouTube - Spoof streaming data): Add information about Android XR devices to the client list for Android VR Auth
- feat(YouTube - Description components): Add `Hide Ask section` and `Hide Featured content section` [#165](https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/165)
- feat(YouTube - Description components): Add `Hide Hype points section` setting
- feat(YouTube - Description components): Add `Hide Subscribe button` setting [ReVanced_Extended#3294](https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/3294)
- feat(YouTube - Spoof streaming data): Remove `Default audio stream language` and `Show audio track button`, which are no longer working
- feat(YouTube - Swipe controls): Add `Fix swipe controls tap and hold speed` setting [ReVanced_Extended#3245](https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/3245)
- fix(YouTube - AuthUtils): Sometimes the Auth token is not updated
- fix(YouTube - Settings): Resolve settings search crash when searching for specific words [ReVanced/revanced-patches#6231](https://github.com/ReVanced/revanced-patches/pull/6231)


Shared
==
- chore(Disable forced auto audio tracks): Change default value [#161](https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/161)
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Add `Android No SDK` client
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Add `TV Legacy` (TV Downgraded) client [yt-dlp/yt-dlp#14887](https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/pull/14887)
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Cache the player JavaScript
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Reflects the latest changes in MediaServiceCore
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Remove `Use yt-dlp ejs` setting (Enabled by default)
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Temporarily remove the `Mobile Web` client due to an issue with the PoToken generator
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Update innerTube client
- feat(Spoof streaming data): Update yt-dlp ejs script
- fix(Spoof streaming data): Delay when playing music using the JavaScript client
- fix(Spoof streaming data): Every time the app fetches the latest client version, an additional 2MB of data is consumed


Announcement
==
- **[Announcement: Playback Issues on YouTube and YouTube Music](https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/3181)**
- **[Troubleshooting playback issues on YouTube and YouTube Music](https://github.com/ReVanced-Extended-Community/Community-Guides/blob/main/news/playback-issues-announcement.md)**
- Currently Reddit 2025.40.0+ can only be patched via CLI or rvx-builder: [Announcement](https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/3288) [Documentation](https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-documentation/blob/main/docs/latest-reddit-patch-info.md).
- Compatible ReVanced Manager: [RVX Manager v1.25.5 (fork)](https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-manager/releases/tag/v1.25.5).
